inputs.prompt: Continuing the same dolly in, the camera settles onto the corner of the black iPhone, the silver-blue glow now tighter and colder as it seeps from a hairline seam in the aluminium. Haze coils slowly, one rim light sculpts the black glass, crushed shadows swallow the background. No people, no text, no logos. Ambient sound is a deepening electrical hum. Stable structure, no warping, no morphing, no extra limbs, physically accurate. Cinematic, ultra-detailed macro, brushed aluminium, black glass reflections, volumetric haze, film grain, shallow depth of field, moody low-key lighting, 8k product photography.
